name: Peanut-Butter Bonbons
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan, melt butter over low heat. Stir in evaporated milk, vanilla, and salt; mix well. Remove from heat.
2. Gradually add confectioners' sugar until the mixture is thick and smooth. Add peanut butter and corn syrup; mix well.
3. Turn out onto a board lightly sprinkled with remaining confectioners' sugar. Knead until consistency of fondant.
4. Form slightly rounded teaspoons of dough into balls.
5. Melt chocolate and shortening in the top of a double boiler over hot, not boiling water. Remove from heat.
6. Dip balls into chocolate just until half covered. Place on waxed paper. Refrigerate until firm. Makes 48 balls.
